notes: M003/S01 audit baseline. Reporting-critical files are tracked as clean or known-dirty so unexpected contamination becomes a policy breach before full remediation lands.

reporting.description: Language integrity baseline for report generation, report chat, report persistence, and reporting UI rendering.

surfacePolicy.allowedRuntimeBehavior: System-controlled prompt text, tool descriptions, fallback outlines, and report-chat instructions must be English-only.
surfacePolicy.handling: Normalize to English before model invocation or persistence.

surfacePolicy.allowedRuntimeBehavior: API payloads returned by report generation and report chat must be English-only and must not contain forbidden scripts.
surfacePolicy.handling: Reject, sanitize, or quarantine before returning to the client.

surfacePolicy.allowedRuntimeBehavior: Persisted report artifacts used as live context must be English-only. Historical dirty artifacts may exist during remediation but must be tracked explicitly.
surfacePolicy.handling: Known-dirty artifacts stay quarantined or marked until normalized.

surfacePolicy.allowedRuntimeBehavior: Critical report labels, report-chat labels, and rendered fallback text must be English-only.
surfacePolicy.handling: Do not silently render contaminated payloads as valid content.

surfacePolicy.allowedRuntimeBehavior: Quoted evidence should be translated before inclusion in report output unless explicitly stored as quarantined source evidence outside the user-facing report path.
surfacePolicy.handling: Translation or quarantine; never mixed-script inline output in controlled report surfaces.

entries.notes: M003/T01-T03 remediation: Cleaned prompts, comments, fallbacks, and logger-facing strings. Maintained English-only policy.
M003/T01-T03 remediation: Cleaned tool text and helper output. Maintained English-only policy.
M003/T01-T03 remediation: Cleaned API route comments and user-facing message assembly. Maintained English-only policy.
M003/T01-T03 remediation: Cleaned locale instruction text and fullwidth punctuation. Maintained English-only policy.

Known mixed-language comments and report-view helper text.

reporting-backend.description: English-only backend prompt and payload surfaces for report generation and report chat.

entries.notes: Prompt templates, tool descriptions, fallback outlines, and report-chat instructions must stay clean.
Tool result wrappers that feed the model must stay clean.
Report API boundary must not reintroduce forbidden scripts into reporting payloads.
Reporting-specific language instruction must remain clean.
Shared integrity utility must remain clean.
